name: Bricks
author: Poki
description: Bricks is a puzzle game that takes the iconic Tetris game to the next level! With a variety of unique brick shapes dropping onto your screen, your goal is to move them to form into lines to gain more points! But here's where the excitement truly begins! Bricks introduces many dynamic mechanics that will push your puzzle-solving skills to the limit. Imagine your play screen rotating, or your controls flipping, or never knowing which pieces would come out the next. Are you ready to take the ultimate challenge? Let's start to move those bricks! How to play Bricks? Move bricks left or right: A/D or the left/right arrow keys Rotate bricks: W or the up arrow key Drop the bricks: S or the down arrow key Who created Bricks? Bricks is created by Jeff Ramos. Play their other games on Poki: Monster Merge , Galactic Empire , Spaders , and Mutazone ! How can I play Bricks for free? You can play Bricks for free on Poki. Can I play Bricks on mobile devices and desktop? Bricks can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
